headline: First underwriting profit at Suncorp personal lines after four consecutive loss years.
evidence: Delivered first underwriting profit at Suncorp personal lines after four consecutive loss years (105% to 98%). Full P&L and balance sheet accountability at CBA including reinsurance placement (up to $1.9bn). Built risk cultures and control frameworks that effectively delivered regulatory reforms across multiple institutions. Developed novel rating factor reducing premiums 10% while improving loss ratio 1%. Identified and removed inappropriate rating factors from the CBA pricing model.
